feature_automated_workflow.desc: Automated infinite loop for platform discovery and validation
feature_automated_workflow.test_criteria: Runs continuously, processes batches, handles errors

feature_scout_agent.desc: Discovery of new platforms via Exa API and internal database

feature_validator_agent.test_criteria: Correctly identifies 4 criteria, handles browser interactions

feature_deep_validation.desc: Secondary validation mechanism for initially rejected platforms
feature_deep_validation.test_criteria: Triggers on partial pass, navigates to pricing/signup pages

feature_optimization_engine.desc: Self-optimizing logic based on batch pass rates and failure patterns
feature_optimization_engine.test_criteria: Adjusts strategies based on stats, triggers emergency optimization

feature_data_persistence.desc: JSON-based data storage for verified, rejected, and stats
feature_data_persistence.test_criteria: Reads/writes JSON files correctly, maintains data integrity
